motion_rule.author: Reviewing Attorney
motion_rule.basis: post-judgment motion to modify parental rights and responsibilities on a substantial change in circumstances, 19-A M.R.S. § 1657

motion_relief: modify the existing order of parental rights and responsibilities entered in this matter
allegations:
On or about July 15, 2024, this Court entered a Judgment establishing the parties' parental rights and responsibilities with respect to the parties' minor children.

Since the entry of that Judgment, there has been a substantial change in the circumstances of the parties and the children.

The modification requested is in the best interest of the minor children.
document_title: Defendant's Motion to Modify Parental Rights and Responsibilities
